statement.markdown: Given the size of the heap and the elements to insert, modify the provided code to correctly insert elements into a max heap.
statement.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer, n, denoting the total number of elements in the heap. The next n lines contain the elements to insert, one per line.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the elements of the heap in the correct order after all elements have been inserted.
statement.notes: The heap will always have a size of n, where n is an integer between 1 and 10000.

examples.explanation: The correct output is the elements of the heap in the correct order after all elements have been inserted.
